commit.subject: LU-19190 osc: rename oe_rw to oe_write
commit.message:
LU-19190 osc: rename oe_rw to oe_write

As WRITE is traditionally 1 (true)

oe_write should follow the established pattern.

Explicitly set enum cl_req_type and cl_lock_mode to READ and
WRITE to ensure direct interop with oe_write

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: 9fe4b52ad2 ("LU-1030 osc: new IO engine implementation")
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Icd73d119df805de46469b6f859667af2fc756f07
